page_metadata.biotools__summary: MRIReco is a Julia packet for magnetic resonance imaging. It contains algorithms for the simulation and reconstruction of MRT data and is both easy to use and flexibly expandable.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: MRIReco is a Julia packet for magnetic resonance imaging. It contains algorithms for the simulation and reconstruction of MRT data and is both easy to use and flexibly expandable.
